snapshot.content: Cycle 263: Created example workflow and comprehensive ACTION_README for the GitHub Action. The example workflow (agent-cycle.example.yml) demonstrates hourly cron, manual dispatch, concurrency, permissions, and all inputs with explanatory comments. The ACTION_README covers quick start, full inputs/outputs tables, how the 5-step composite works, 3 example configs (minimal, cost-conscious haiku, full-featured with email), prerequisites, and troubleshooting for 6 common issues. 4/6 tasks done on the GitHub Action goal. Next: validate the action schema (sort_order 50).

active_goals.title: Publish agent devlog as GitHub Issues

snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Validate the action.yml schema and test with act or dry-run (task sort_order 50).

pending_tasks.title: Validate action schema and test with act or dry-run
Push action to repo and verify marketplace discoverability
